dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been experiencing a productive cough with yellow-green sputum and significant dyspnea for the past four days. I also have a fever of 38.7°C, chills, and right-sided pleuritic chest pain.
My fatigue has been increasing, and I have had a marked decrease in appetite. The pleuritic chest pain is currently at a level five.
I have no history of hemoptysis, orthopnea, or leg swelling. I also deny any recent travel or known sick contacts.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Pulmonary embolism; Acute bronchitis; Pleurisy; Congestive heart failure)
